items.title: Long Run
items.description: Run 10 km at an easy pace of 6:30-7:00 min/km. Focus on maintaining a heart rate in Zone 2 (approximately 130-145 bpm).

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: After a 10-minute warm-up, perform 5x800m intervals at a pace of 5:10 min/km with 2 minutes of recovery jog between each interval. Cool down for 10 minutes afterward.

items.title: Strength Training
items.description: Focus on full-body strength training with an emphasis on legs and core. Include 3 sets of 10-12 reps for squats, lunges, and deadlifts, with 1-2 minutes of rest between sets.

items.title: Recovery Run
items.description: Run 5 km at a very easy pace of 7:30-8:00 min/km. Keep your heart rate below 130 bpm to aid recovery.
